item.journal.name: Fisherman's Journal
item.journal.description: A sturdy journal for tracking every fish in the valley. Hold it and right-click to learn how to use it.
message.journal-unlocked: Journal learned! Press {{key}} to open the Fisherman's Journal.
menu.journal.title: Fisherman's Journal
menu.journal.turn-page-hint: Use the arrows to browse the fish list.
config.enable-journal.name: Enable Journal
config.enable-journal.tooltip: Whether the Fisherman's Journal mechanic is enabled.
config.journal-key.name: Journal Hotkey
config.journal-key.tooltip: The key which opens the journal (after unlocking it).
